family_results.label: SQL Injection
family_results.description: Database query manipulation attempts such as UNION, OR 1=1, SLEEP, or DROP patterns.

family_results.label: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
family_results.description: Script injection attempts targeting browser execution via tags, handlers, or javascript: payloads.

family_results.label: DDoS / Request Flood
family_results.description: Burst traffic, token bucket exhaustion, or request flooding intended to degrade availability.

family_results.label: Path Traversal / LFI
family_results.description: Directory traversal and local file access attempts such as ../ or /etc/passwd payloads.

family_results.label: Command Injection / RCE
family_results.description: Shell chaining and operating-system command execution attempts against the application stack.

family_results.label: Brute Force / Login Abuse
family_results.description: Repeated authentication attempts, password spraying, or credential stuffing behavior.

family_results.label: Reconnaissance / Scanning
family_results.description: Automated probing of many paths, admin surfaces, or technology fingerprints.

family_results.label: Malicious Automation / Bot Activity
family_results.description: Suspicious scripted traffic from scanners, bots, or repeat abusive clients.

family_results.label: Suspicious Payload / Evasion
family_results.description: Encoded, ambiguous, or evasive payloads likely attempting to bypass normal signature checks.

family_results.label: Anomaly / Zero-Day Indicator
family_results.description: Abnormal behavior flagged by the hybrid model despite lacking a fixed rule signature.
